ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "construct" INTEGER /* Reference to the construct used in the experiment */,
  "method" INTEGER /* Method used in the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher conducting the experiment */,
  "experiment_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the experiment */,
  "equipment_used" TEXT /* Equipment used for the experiment */,
  "environment_conditions" TEXT /* Environmental conditions during the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_method FOREIGN KEY ("method") REFERENCES methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_construct FOREIGN KEY ("construct") REFERENCES constructs ("construct_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spectra_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each spectral data entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment from which the data was collected */,
  "concentration" REAL /* Protein concentration used in the experiment */,
  "wavelength" REAL /* Emission wavelength measured */,
  "se_bleaching_corrected_spectra" REAL /* Standard error of the bleaching corrected spectra */,
  "avg_bleaching_corrected_spectra" REAL /* Average of the bleaching corrected spectra */,
  "norm_bleaching" REAL /* Normalization factor for bleaching correction */,
  "measurement_time" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the spectral data was measured */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the instrument used for the measurement */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature at which the measurement was taken */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity at which the measurement was taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spectra_data_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "constructs" (
  "construct_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each construct */,
  "construct_name" TEXT /* Name of the construct (e.g., W311*-GFP) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the construct */,
  "molecular_weight" REAL /* Molecular weight of the construct */,
  "sequence" TEXT /* Amino acid sequence of the construct */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the construct (e.g., synthetic, natural) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("construct_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the method (e.g., unroofed) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the method */,
  "protocol" TEXT /* Detailed protocol or steps of the method */,
  "references" TEXT /* References to scientific papers or protocols */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the researcher belongs to */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the researcher */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or title of the researcher (e.g., PhD student, postdoc) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_corrections" (
  "correction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each correction */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the spectral data entry that was corrected */,
  "correction_type" TEXT /* Type of correction applied (e.g., bleaching correction) */,
  "correction_value" REAL /* Value of the correction */,
  "applied_date" TEXT /* Date when the correction was applied */,
  "correction_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the correction */,
  "performed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who performed the correction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("correction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_corrections_performed_by FOREIGN KEY ("performed_by") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_corrections_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES spectra_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_analyses" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the spectral data entry that was analyzed */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed (e.g., normalization) */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the analysis */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used in the analysis */,
  "analysis_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the analysis */,
  "performed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who performed the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_analyses_performed_by FOREIGN KEY ("performed_by") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_analyses_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES spectra_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_shares" (
  "share_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data share */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the spectral data entry that was shared */,
  "shared_with_researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher with whom the data was shared */,
  "share_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was shared */,
  "share_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the data share */,
  "shared_by" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who shared the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("share_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_shares_shared_by FOREIGN KEY ("shared_by") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_shares_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES spectra_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_shares_shared_with_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("shared_with_researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment from which the report was generated */,
  "report_title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  "conclusions" TEXT /* Conclusions drawn from the report */,
  "co_authors" TEXT /* IDs of co-authors who contributed to the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the report */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the report was accessed */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to access the report (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution or organization the user belongs to */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
